descriptionShort: University of Maine hockey freshmen reflect on season after elimination from Hockey East quarterfinals.
descriptionLong: Freshman defensemen Dave Nonis and Stan Czenczek of the University of Maine-Orono hockey team discuss their season after being eliminated from the Hockey East quarterfinals by Boston University. Both players, British Columbia natives, highlight the valuable playing time they received despite some freshman mistakes, and express disappointment that the graduating senior class did not advance to the Hockey East semifinals and finals.

attribution.headline: Maine Hockey Freshmen Look Ahead to 1985-86 Season
